parameters.query:
SELECT dialog_id, store_id, employee_id, transcript, status
FROM dialogs
WHERE dialog_id = '{{ $json.body.dialog_id }}'::uuid
  AND status = 'transcribed';

INSERT INTO analysis_results (dialog_id, result, model_version)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.dialog_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.result).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.model_version }}'
)
RETURNING id, dialog_id;

UPDATE dialogs SET
  status = 'analyzed',
  analyzed_at = NOW()
WHERE dialog_id = '{{ $json.dialog_id }}'::uuid
RETURNING dialog_id, status;
